highlights.text: Worms are usually contracted by ingesting contaminated food or water, but they can also be acquired by touching objects or surfaces that are contaminated with worm eggs and then transferring those eggs to the mouth

Worms are usually contracted by ingesting contaminated food or water, but they can also be acquired by touching objects or surfaces that are contaminated with worm eggs and then transferring those eggs to the mouth.
